The '''Hitak mountains''' were located on [[Turak IV]]. The volcanic mountains were used as strategic hiding places by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] soldiers who fought during the [[Battle of Turak IV]]. The rebels would strike from the mountains and retreat back to them, allowing them a good deal of concealment.<ref name="IE" />
